---
title: "Pulmonary Function Test Report"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: false
    theme: cosmo
params:
  result: NULL
  title: "Pulmonary Function Test Report"
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
result <- params$result
stopifnot(!is.null(result), nrow(result) >= 1)
```

```{r}
# Demographic header (uses the first row).
row <- result[1, , drop = FALSE]
```

## Patient

```{r results = "asis"}
parts <- c()
if ("age"    %in% colnames(row)) parts <- c(parts, sprintf("%g yo", row$age))
if ("sex"    %in% colnames(row)) parts <- c(parts, row$sex)
if ("height" %in% colnames(row)) parts <- c(parts, sprintf("%g cm", row$height))
if ("race"   %in% colnames(row)) parts <- c(parts, row$race)
cat(paste(parts, collapse = " &middot; "))
```

## Reference values and z-scores

```{r}
measure_specs <- list(
  c("fev1",    "FEV1"),
  c("fvc",     "FVC"),
  c("fev1fvc", "FEV1/FVC"),
  c("fef2575", "FEF25-75"),
  c("fef75",   "FEF75"),
  c("frc",     "FRC"),
  c("tlc",     "TLC"),
  c("rv",      "RV"),
  c("rv_tlc",  "RV/TLC"),
  c("erv",     "ERV"),
  c("ic",      "IC"),
  c("vc",      "VC"),
  c("dlco",    "DLCO"),
  c("tlco",    "TLCO"),
  c("kco_si",  "KCO (SI)"),
  c("kco_tr",  "KCO (tr)"),
  c("va",      "VA")
)
# pft_spirometry(year = 2022) writes the GLI Global outputs with a
# `_2022` suffix; prefer the suffixed column when present so the table
# is populated under both year = 2017 and year = 2022.
resolve_col <- function(key, role) {
  c2 <- paste0(key, "_", role, "_2022")
  c1 <- paste0(key, "_", role)
  if (c2 %in% colnames(row)) c2
  else if (c1 %in% colnames(row)) c1
  else NA_character_
}
rows <- list()
for (spec in measure_specs) {
  key <- spec[1]; label <- spec[2]
  pred_col <- resolve_col(key, "pred")
  if (is.na(pred_col)) next
  meas_col <- paste0(key, "_measured")    # input column, never suffixed
  z_col    <- resolve_col(key, "zscore")
  sev_col  <- resolve_col(key, "severity")
  rows[[length(rows) + 1]] <- data.frame(
    Measure   = label,
    Predicted = formatC(row[[pred_col]], digits = 3, format = "fg"),
    Measured  = if (meas_col %in% colnames(row)) formatC(row[[meas_col]], digits = 3, format = "fg") else "-",
    `Z-score` = if (!is.na(z_col))   formatC(row[[z_col]],   digits = 3, format = "fg") else "-",
    Severity  = if (!is.na(sev_col)) as.character(row[[sev_col]]) else "-",
    check.names = FALSE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}
if (length(rows) > 0) {
  tab <- do.call(rbind, rows)
  knitr::kable(tab, row.names = FALSE)
}
```

## Interpretation

```{r results = "asis"}
if ("ats_classification" %in% colnames(row) && !is.na(row$ats_classification)) {
  combo <- if ("ats_pattern_combination" %in% colnames(row)) {
    sprintf(" (%s)", row$ats_pattern_combination)
  } else ""
  cat(sprintf("- **ATS pattern:** %s%s\n", row$ats_classification, combo))
}
if ("prism" %in% colnames(row) && !is.na(row$prism)) {
  cat(sprintf("- **PRISm:** %s\n", row$prism))
}
for (m in c("fev1", "fvc", "fev1fvc")) {
  bdr_sig <- paste0(m, "_bdr_significant")
  bdr_pct <- paste0(m, "_bdr_pct")
  if (bdr_sig %in% colnames(row) && !is.na(row[[bdr_sig]])) {
    cat(sprintf("- **BDR %s:** %s (%s%% of predicted)\n",
                toupper(m), row[[bdr_sig]],
                formatC(row[[bdr_pct]], digits = 3, format = "fg")))
  }
}
```

```{r fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4, eval = requireNamespace("ggplot2", quietly = TRUE) && any(grepl("_zscore", colnames(row)))}
pft::pft_plot(row)
```

---

*Report generated by the* `pft` *R package. Reference equations and
interpretation logic follow the ERS/ATS 2022 technical standard
(Stanojevic et al., Eur Respir J 60:2101499). Not validated for
diagnostic decision-making; clinician interpretation required.*
